patterns.label: Entropy Subtraction Paradigm
patterns.measurement_proxy: Ratio of dereferenced-node dissolution events to total system memory events per cycle (GC throughput; apoptotic index; repeal rate)
patterns.task_conditioned_baseline: Trigger threshold = resource utilization > 0.85 OR zero-reference node count > 5% of total graph
patterns.structural_invariant: DAG topology preservation: removal targets only nodes with in-degree=0 from active reference set
key_citations: Jones et al. 2011 — GC reachability-based algorithms
arXiv:2504.11654 — Pathological cases for reachability-based GC
Li 2019 (Semantic Scholar) — Cancer Niche as Garbage Disposal Machine

patterns.label: Epistemic Escrow Paradigm
patterns.measurement_proxy: Contradiction isolation rate; explosion-prevention coverage; localized Betti-1 loop count in belief graph
patterns.task_conditioned_baseline: Escrow activation if incoming proposition P triggers both exec-protocol A and NOT-A simultaneously
canonical_domains: Logic / AI (Paraconsistent LFI, AGM Belief Revision)
patterns.structural_invariant: Consistency operator ○ in LFI localizes explosion; escrowed node forms topological 1-cycle (H₁ homology class) isolated from main state machine
key_citations: arXiv:2412.06117v3 — Paraconsistent Belief Revision: RCBr LFI framework
Hugging Face Forum 2026 — Paraconsistent Logic and AI Models (hallucination as explosion failure)

patterns.label: Constitutional Austenite Forging
patterns.measurement_proxy: Plasticity-stability ratio; Fisher Information diagonal (EWC lambda); Hessian trace post-quench normalized by task gradient norm
patterns.task_conditioned_baseline: Phase-lock success if catastrophic forgetting rate < 5% across sequential task battery after quench
canonical_domains: ML / Continual Learning (Elastic Weight Consolidation, Nested Learning)
Constitutional Law (Amendment rigidity vs. interpretive flexibility)
patterns.structural_invariant: Diffusionless transformation: parameter updates remain bounded by Hessian curvature; global invariants survive local plastic deformation
key_citations: arXiv:2507.10485 — EWC replication; synaptic consolidation analogy
ICML 2025 poster:43833 — Predicting susceptibility to catastrophic forgetting
Google Research Blog 2025 — Nested Learning paradigm for continual learning

patterns.label: Topological Decompression
patterns.measurement_proxy: Persistent Betti number reduction ratio; bottleneck distance pre/post decompression; manifold intrinsic dimensionality delta
patterns.task_conditioned_baseline: Decompression required when persistent H₁ + H₂ features exceed manifold embedding capacity (context window saturation proxy)
patterns.structural_invariant: Part-whole transitivity preserved via Mayer-Vietoris sequence; component-object typing maintained across dimensional projection
key_citations: ar5iv:1511.01426 — Multiscale Topology of Chromatin Folding (Emmett, Schweinhart, Rabadan)
arXiv:2509.16877 — TDA and Topological Deep Learning review 2025
NeurIPS 2024 — Persistent Homology for High-Dimensional Data via Spectral Methods

patterns.label: Distributed Truth Paradigm
patterns.measurement_proxy: Byzantine fault tolerance threshold (f < n/3); quorum coverage ratio; Nakamoto coefficient; thermodynamic cost per validated bit
patterns.task_conditioned_baseline: Consensus valid if ≥ 2f+1 sovereign nodes independently validate execution trace without shared communication channel
patterns.structural_invariant: Non-overlapping epistemic jurisdictions; no single node can unilaterally alter global state; validation requires thermodynamic expenditure
key_citations: Stanford SBC25 — Alpenglow / Solana consensus protocol
IEEE Access 2025 — Blockchain-enhanced FL with PBFT/PoS/PoA
